title: DisplayManagerService disconnectWifiDisplay zero permission — WFD session DoS
notes: connectWifiDisplay, startWifiDisplayScan, pauseWifiDisplay, resumeWifiDisplay all require CONFIGURE_WIFI_DISPLAY. But disconnectWifiDisplay() has zero permission check (code comment explicitly states this). Any app can repeatedly disconnect active Miracast/WiDi sessions — denial of service against wireless display presentations.
